title: Moonshot AI accessed Nvidia's chips despite Chinese export ban, White House official says
summary_full: A White House official said Moonshot AI, which released the powerful Kimi K3 model last week, accessed Nvidia's GB300 chips in Thailand.
summary_public: A White House official said Moonshot AI, which released the powerful Kimi K3 model last week, accessed Nvidia's GB300 chips in Thailand.
